# Treadwell Restoration

> Treadwell Restoration is a locally-owned water damage restoration and reconstruction company serving 12 cities across the Inland Empire region of Southern California. We handle both emergency mitigation (water extraction, structural drying, mold prevention) and full reconstruction (drywall, flooring, cabinetry, rebuild) in-house. Our foundation is 25+ years of general contracting experience.

## Core Facts

- **Company:** Treadwell Restoration LLC
- **Location:** Fontana, California (service-area business; no public storefront)
- **Phone:** (909) 340-3888
- **Hours:** 24/7 emergency response
- **Website:** https://treadwellrestoration.com

## Service Area (12 cities)

**San Bernardino County:** Fontana, Rancho Cucamonga, Ontario, Rialto, Bloomington, Upland, Montclair

**Riverside County:** Jurupa Valley, Riverside, Eastvale, Norco

**Los Angeles County:** Claremont

## Services Offered

### Phase 1 — Emergency Mitigation
- **Water Damage Mitigation & Cleanup:** Emergency water extraction, moisture mapping, industrial drying with air movers and dehumidifiers, removal of unsalvageable materials, antimicrobial treatment, daily moisture logs until dry.
- **Mold Assessment & Prevention:** Moisture readings, antimicrobial application, containment setup when needed, coordination with licensed mold remediation specialists for out-of-scope work.

### Phase 2 — Reconstruction
- **Reconstruction & Restoration:** Drywall replacement, flooring (hardwood, laminate, vinyl, tile, carpet), cabinetry, trim, texture matching, paint, structural framing repairs.
- **Insurance Claims Coordination:** Photo and moisture documentation, Xactimate-compatible scope of work, direct adjuster communication, supplement requests, final claim closeout package.

## Key Differentiators

1. **Reconstruction in-house.** Unlike most restoration companies that sub out the rebuild phase, Treadwell handles reconstruction natively because of our general contracting background.
2. **Insurance coordination included.** We communicate directly with the homeowner's insurance adjuster and handle all documentation. Homeowners don't play middleman on their own claim.
3. **Local ownership and dispatch.** Calls go to the local team, not a national dispatch center. Same team from first call to final walkthrough.

## Positioning

Clients can hire Treadwell for:
- Emergency mitigation only (if they want a different contractor for the rebuild)
- Reconstruction only (if another company already handled the mitigation)
- Both phases (continuity through a single company with one point of contact)

There is no bundling requirement. The continuity option is offered but not forced.

## Common Customer Questions

- **Available 24/7:** Yes. Line is answered at all hours. Typical on-site response within 60 to 90 minutes in service area for active emergencies.
- **Free estimates:** Yes.
- **Insurance billing:** Direct to carrier when appropriate. Customers typically only pay their deductible.
- **Licensed and insured:** Yes. California Contractors State License Board (CSLB) licensed. General liability and workers compensation coverage maintained.
- **Commercial projects:** Handled, but primary focus is residential.
